ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of media content */,
  "show_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the show or movie */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the media content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the media content */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the media content */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Cast members of the media content */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the media content */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the media content */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the media content */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the media content */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the media content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media content */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the media content */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the content thumbnail */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the content trailer */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was last updated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the media content was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_content_rating FOREIGN KEY ("rating") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_content_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_content_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_content_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media content */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_content_genres" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media content */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "rating" TEXT /* User's rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended media content */,
  "score" REAL /* Recommendation score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media content being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the media content */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the media content was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
